rules: No completion credit without a ResultPacket or ReviewPacket.
Every completion credit must link to a passing VerificationContract or an explicit review hold.
Direct-control loops do not count as throughput.
Proposal-only loops do not count as throughput.
Narrative-only success text never counts as credit.
Backlog, task, and result/review state must reconcile before credit is issued.
Autonomous usefulness is tracked separately from throughput credit in reports/truth-inventory/autonomous-value-proof.json.
Control-plane completions may remain valid throughput credit but never count as autonomous operator or product value.
